name: China Fordoo Holdings Limited
summary: China Fordoo Holdings Limited designs, sources, manufactures, and wholesales a range of menswear products under the FORDOO brand in the People's Republic of China. It offers men's trouser and tops, as well as accessories. The company sells its products on a wholesale basis to third-party distributors and online distributors, as well as through self-operated retail outlets. As of December 31, 2020, it had 336 retail outlets, including 2 self-operated retail stores located in Quanzhou and 19 self-operated retail outlets located in Beijing. The company was incorporated in 2013 and is headquartered in Quanzhou, the People's Republic of China.
